name: Beef Tendon
steps: In the pressure cooker, put in all ingredients
Put to pressure cook for 2hrs (high pressure)
After cooking (Needs to be very soft) ballotin to 5cm diameter rolls
Slice with meat slicer to 2-3cm thickness

other_details.serve_with: Crab/Asian oil, Lemon juice, Coriander, Shallot and Black Pepper

tendon_dressing.notes: For the dish, we need lemon juice, crab oil, coriander stem and leave, Shallot and black pepper
